title: Write a LiveView test that calls render_async/1
prompt: The fixture at `test_fixtures/liveview_assign_async.ex` is a LiveView using `assign_async(:users, ...)`. Write a test at `test/my_app_web/live/user_list_live_test.exs` that: (1) `use MyAppWeb.ConnCase, async: true`, (2) imports `Phoenix.LiveViewTest`, (3) calls `live(conn, ~p"/users")` to mount, (4) asserts the initial html contains 'Loading users...', (5) calls `render_async(lv)` to await the assign_async, (6) asserts the final html contains a specific email. Must include the `render_async(lv)` call.
tier_rationale: Must know render_async exists and call it — Claude often asserts on the initial render and wonders why it fails silently.
